params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with load and reset capabilities. Upon a reset signal, it sets the data to all ones. When the load signal is activated, it captures the 4-bit input data. On each clock cycle, if neither reset nor load is active, the register shifts its contents to the left, with the least significant bit (LSB) dropping out as the most significant bit (MSB) is filled with a one. The LSB also outputs the shifted-out value, while the current state of the register can be accessed via a separate output.
